rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when adding implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure annex blocks are placed in the correct scope for their intended purpose
Preserve existing model elements when adding new annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate scope for the component or implementation
Ensure all referenced ports and variables are visible in the annex block's scope
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes that refer to subcomponent ports
Avoid placing assumptions or guarantees in component type annexes that refer to implementation-specific elements
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax details not directly related to annex placement
